description_long: This ornate chair features a highly decorative design inspired by ancient Egyptian motifs, with intricate carvings and colorful inlays along the armrests and sides. The backrest displays a detailed painted scene of two figures, likely of royal or divine status, surrounded by symbolic elements. The seat is adorned with a checkered pattern, and the legs are sculpted to resemble animal limbs, complete with lion heads at the front corners. The armrests are wide and elaborately decorated with winged motifs and hieroglyphic-like details. Four canopic jar-like figures are attached to the rear, adding to the chair's ceremonial appearance. The overall construction suggests a blend of wood and painted or inlaid materials, giving it a regal and historical presence.
description: An elaborately decorated Egyptian-style chair with painted scenes, animal-shaped legs, and colorful inlays, exuding a regal and ceremonial appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the detailed winged motif on the armrest, animal-shaped front leg, and the intricate carvings along the side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting four canopic jar-like figures attached to the back and the plain wooden panels of the chair's rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the decorative armrest and animal-shaped leg, with visible inlays and carvings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the checkered seat pattern, lion head details on the front legs, and the painted scene on the backrest.
